title: \t was not being recognized as tab in --format
body:
When doing kpod images --format "{{.ID}}\t{{.Tag}}"
the "\t" was being passed in as a string of "\" and "t"
instead of as a tab character.

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: @umohnani8 UGH, looks like Red Hat CI failed due to not being able to connect to the Fedora registry (again).

Merging but @umohnani8 could you look into my question above.
@rh-atomic-bot r+

:pushpin: Commit 6e783b5 has been approved by `rhatdan`
